AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit rationale (cross-cutting, user-generated, low bar preserved, not yet escalated to decisions or followups).

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: Daybook references observations.md in prose without an anchor link; paths are relative and resolve, but cross-reference is descriptive rather than navigable.

AR4.justification: Both writes are append-only (observations.md appended at end, daybook is a new per-date file); re-running would not corrupt history.
